name: io.github.petropt/petro-mcp
title: petro-mcp
description: MCP server for petroleum engineering calculations: LAS well log parsing, multi-well comparison, production CSV loading, Arps decline curves, black-oil PVT, petrophysics (Vshale, density porosity, Archie, net pay), reservoir volumetrics (OOIP/OGIP, P/Z), and oilfield unit conversions.
